name: Cauliflower Scramble
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Cauliflower in cheese sauce, frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cauliflower in pouches in Microwave Oven for 9 to 10 minutes or until thawed. Pierce holes in pouches with the tines of a fork to allow steam to escape.
2. In a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish, place zucchini, onion and butter. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes or until zucchini and onion are tender.
3. Add cauliflower in cheese sauce and tomatoes to onion-zucchini mixture. Add salt and thyme leaves to the mixture.
4. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until tomatoes are tender.
